use_cases: Display ticket confirmation after event booking or purchase
Show payment receipt with generated barcode for validation
Provide order completion status in checkout flows
Serve as digital ticket for entry verification at events
ai_summary: A flat-styled ticket confirmation card component displaying payment status with checkmark icon, Mastercard payment method indicator, dashed separator line, and procedurally generated barcode. Designed for e-commerce checkout confirmation, event booking receipts, and order completion workflows across desktop and mobile platforms.
